bodySummary.error: Next.js not found page from deployed image

steps.name: queue workflow from UI
steps.note: No receipt text was visible; API probe separately confirms live deployed route is 404.

steps.name: intake to brief publish gate
steps.error: Timed out waiting for 'Publish blocked - approvals pending.'

actionsThisRun.detail: Changed live deployment CPU request from 100m to 5m after scheduler reported 0/2 nodes available due to insufficient CPU. No new infrastructure created.
Added AllowVentureOSStagingWeb host allow rule before managed BotControl after sampled WAF requests showed CategoryHttpLibrary blocks.

Built current repo image locally with /api/venture/workflow/queue, but ECR tag ca22741 was not published after Buildx push, Buildx single-artifact push, docker push, and docker push --platform attempts stalled at layer/manifest publication.

defects.title: venture-os pod was Pending due to exhausted staging CPU requests
defects.evidence: Scheduler reported 0/2 nodes available: 2 Insufficient cpu. Live request patch to 5m made pod Running 1/1.
defects.fixThisRun: kubectl set resources deployment venture-os -n venture-os-staging --requests=cpu=5m,memory=256Mi --limits=cpu=1,memory=1Gi
defects.residualRisk: fabric-os overlay still declares cpu request 100m; reapply may restore the Pending condition.

defects.title: staging WAF blocked venture-os non-health routes
defects.evidence: WAF sampled requests showed AWSManagedRulesBotControlRuleSet#CategoryHttpLibrary blocking venture-staging.gtcx.trade /, /api/ready, and /api/venture/opportunities.
defects.fixThisRun: Added AllowVentureOSStagingWeb to gtcx-staging-waf-af-south-1 at priority 3.
defects.residualRisk: fabric-os Terraform WAF source owns the durable rule; current repo cannot persist that source change.

defects.title: deployed image is stale and lacks /api/venture/workflow/queue
defects.evidence: Current repo build includes the route; live staging POST /api/venture/workflow/queue returns 404; ECR latest remains June 17 image lineage and ca22741 is absent.
defects.fixAttemptedThisRun: Built linux/amd64 current image locally and attempted ECR push through three methods.
defects.hardBlocker: ECR push transport from this environment stalls before publishing ca22741; exact unblock is a successful push of 348389439381.dkr.ecr.af-south-1.amazonaws.com/gtcx-venture-os:ca22741 and :latest, then rollout restart of deployment/venture-os.

defects.title: staging database cannot be seeded because no DATABASE_URL is bound
defects.evidence: AWS Secrets Manager secret gtcx/venture-os/staging/api-keys and K8s secret venture-os-secrets expose VENTURE_WEBHOOK_SECRET only; deployment has no DATABASE_URL or VENTURE_DATA_BACKEND=postgres.
defects.hardBlocker: Provide a staging Postgres DATABASE_URL in the vault and bind VENTURE_DATA_BACKEND=postgres to the deployment, then run NODE_ENV=demo pnpm db:seed:demo against that target.

defects.title: live UI brief publish-gate check did not show expected blocked-publish text
defects.evidence: Headless live e2e timed out waiting for 'Publish blocked - approvals pending.' after intake-to-brief flow.
defects.nextDiagnostic: Re-run after current image deploy; if still failing, inspect RollingBriefWorkspace workflow state persistence across route transition.

hardBlockers.specificBlocker: Current image tag ca22741 cannot be published from this environment; ECR describe-images confirms tag absent after repeated push methods stalled.
hardBlockers.exactUnblock: Publish 348389439381.dkr.ecr.af-south-1.amazonaws.com/gtcx-venture-os:ca22741 and :latest to ECR, then run kubectl rollout restart deployment/venture-os -n venture-os-staging and verify /api/venture/workflow/queue returns 201.

hardBlockers.specificBlocker: No staging DATABASE_URL is present in aws-secretsmanager://af-south-1/gtcx/venture-os/staging/api-keys or in Kubernetes secret venture-os-secrets.
hardBlockers.exactUnblock: Add a staging Postgres DATABASE_URL and VENTURE_DATA_BACKEND=postgres to the vault/ExternalSecret path, restart the deployment, run migrations, and seed with NODE_ENV=demo.
